revision.text: '''篠田王子'''（しのだおうじ）は[[九十九王子]]の9番目で現存していない。[[大阪府]][[和泉市]]王子町3の聖神社鳥居前の道をすこし南下したところに跡地の石碑がたっている。

'''篠田王子'''（'''しのだおうじ'''）は、[[九十九王子]]の9番目の神社である。現存していない。
[[大阪府]][[和泉市]]王子町3の聖神社鳥居前の道を少し南下したところに跡地の石碑がたっている。

*[[JR]][[阪和線]][[北信太駅]]

'''篠田王子'''（'''しのだおうじ'''）は、[[九十九王子]]の9番目の[[神社]]である。現存していない。
[[大阪府]][[和泉市]]王子町3に鎮座する[[聖神社]]の[[鳥居]]が[[熊野街道]]沿いにあり、その鳥居から少し南下した住宅に囲まれたところに跡地の石碑がたっている。
*石碑の最寄 [[西日本旅客鉄道]][[阪和線]][[北信太駅]]

revision.comment: Adding an intro to all of them. It has a magic word instead of a substitution because all of them are gonna be moved in the future to proper pagenames. See comment for more info.
revision.text:
''{{PAGENAME}}'' is one of the {{ill|Kujūku Ōji|fr|Kujūkuōji|ja|九十九王子|lt=99 ōji Shrines}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]]. <!--PAGENAME magic word should be substituted in the future when this is moved to its final pagename. This was added to a few pages not created on Feb 8 because they were very barren and this gives context to the fact that they are in a large group of pages all to be translated more or less as a group similar to the Ise Shrines--> ==List of the 99 Oji== {| class="navbox mw-collapsible" ! colspan="10" style="background:#33ff99" |{{Tnavbar-collapsible| [[九十九王子]]一覧 |篠田王子}} |- | revision.text:
[[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] '''篠田王子'''（'''しのだおうじ'''）は、[[九十九王子]]の9番目の[[神社]]である。現存していない。
[[大阪府]][[和泉市]]王子町3に鎮座する[[聖神社 (和泉市)|聖神社]]の[[鳥居]]が[[熊野街道]]沿いにあり、その鳥居から少し南下した住宅に囲まれたところに跡地の石碑がたっている。
*石碑の最寄 [[西日本旅客鉄道]][[阪和線]][[北信太駅]]
== 関連項目 == * [[熊野信仰]] * [[熊野古道]] - [[紀伊路]] * [[九十九王子]] *: [[大鳥居王子]] - '''篠田王子''' - [[平松王子]]
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたおうし}} [[Category:大阪府の神社]] [[Category:和泉市の歴史]] [[Category:九十九王子]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[篠田王子]] to [[Shinoda Ōji]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|qid=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|qid=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|qq=|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|qq=|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|qq=|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|qq=|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|qq=|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|qq=|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|qq=|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}
