<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, [[:en:Izumi, Osaka|Izumi, Osaka]].
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''[[:en:Kita-Shinoda Station|Kita-Shinoda Station]]''' on the [[:en:Hanwa Line|Hanwa Line]], operated by [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11603815]] Wikidata name: shinoda-ōji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]]
'''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]]
'''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]]
'''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station|1=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line|1=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Ōtorii Ōji|ja|大鳥居王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtorii Ōji|1=Ōtorii Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11441988}} * '''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' - {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483087}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]]
'''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station|1=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line|1=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:篠田王子]]
'''Shinoda Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}} | image = [[File:篠田王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|篠田王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|WD=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} }}
'''{{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11603815}}''' (しのだおうじ) was the 9th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists.
== History == While the shrine itself has not survived, a stone monument marks the former site of Shinoda Ōji. This monument is located in a residential area slightly south of the {{ill|Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|ja|聖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hijiri Shrine (Izumi)|1=Hijiri Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611101}} torii gate, which stands along the Kumano Kōdō in {{ill|Ōji-chō|ja|王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-chō|1=Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572995}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|WD=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}.
== Access == * The nearest station to the stone monument is '''{{ill|Kita-Shinoda Station|en|Kita-Shinoda Station|WD=Q856975|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station|1=Kita-Shinoda Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|WD=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line|1=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}}.
